inputs.label: Oil 1 Required HLB
inputs.businessContext: Required HLB value of the first oil component

businessContext_i18n.en: Required HLB value of the first oil component
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birinci yağ bileşeninin gerekli HLB değeri
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur HLB requise du premier composant huileux
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor HLB requerido del primer componente de aceite
businessContext_i18n.ar: قيمة HLB المطلوبة لمكون الزيت الأول

inputs.label: Oil 1 Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of the first oil in the blend

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of the first oil in the blend
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz des ersten Öls in der Mischung
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de la première huile dans le mélange
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje del primer aceite en la mezcla

inputs.label: Oil 2 Required HLB
inputs.businessContext: Required HLB value of the second oil component

businessContext_i18n.en: Required HLB value of the second oil component
businessContext_i18n.tr: İkinci yağ bileşeninin gerekli HLB değeri
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur HLB requise du deuxième composant huileux
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor HLB requerido del segundo componente de aceite
businessContext_i18n.ar: قيمة HLB المطلوبة لمكون الزيت الثاني

inputs.label: Oil 2 Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of the second oil in the blend

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of the second oil in the blend
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz des zweiten Öls in der Mischung
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de la deuxième huile dans le mélange
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje del segundo aceite en la mezcla

inputs.label: Oil 3 Required HLB
inputs.businessContext: Required HLB value of the third oil component

businessContext_i18n.en: Required HLB value of the third oil component
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üçüncü yağ bileşeninin gerekli HLB değeri
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur HLB requise du troisième composant huileux
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor HLB requerido del tercer componente de aceite
businessContext_i18n.ar: قيمة HLB المطلوبة لمكون الزيت الثالث

inputs.label: Oil 3 Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of the third oil in the blend

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of the third oil in the blend
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz des dritten Öls in der Mischung
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de la troisième huile dans le mélange
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje del tercer aceite en la mezcla

formulas.requiredHLB: (oil1_hlb * oil1_percent + oil2_hlb * oil2_percent + oil3_hlb * oil3_percent) / (oil1_percent + oil2_percent + oil3_percent) || 0
formulas.weightedSum: oil1_hlb * oil1_percent + oil2_hlb * oil2_percent + oil3_hlb * oil3_percent

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
